query: SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros_total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2))), 2) as valor_total FROM vendas GROUP BY afericao ORDER BY afericao;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT afericao, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(quantidade AS DECIMAL(12,3))), 3) as litros_total, ROUND(SUM(CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2))), 2) as valor_total FROM vendas GROUP BY afericao ORDER BY afericao;
